prompts.title: About Myself
prompts.prompt: Write 5-8 sentences about yourself. Include your name, age, where you live, your family, and what you like to do.

prompts.title: My Best Friend
prompts.prompt: Describe your best friend. What do they look like? What do you do together?
hints: Say why they are your best friend

prompts.title: My Favorite Day
prompts.prompt: Write about your favorite day of the week. What do you usually do on that day? Why is it your favorite?
hints: Use time words: in the morning, after lunch
Give reasons why you like this day

prompts.title: A Place I Love
prompts.prompt: Describe a place you love to visit. It can be a park, a restaurant, or any place. What does it look like? How do you feel there?

prompts.title: An Unforgettable Experience
prompts.prompt: Write about an experience you will never forget. What happened? How did you feel? What did you learn from it?

prompts.title: Technology in Our Lives
prompts.prompt: How has technology changed our daily lives? Write about the positive and negative effects of technology.

prompts.title: If I Could Change One Thing
prompts.prompt: If you could change one thing in the world, what would it be? Why? How would you do it?

prompts.title: The Future of Education
prompts.prompt: Write an essay about how education will change in the next 20 years. Consider technology, methods, and challenges.
